chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1003 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 4239/2023 3.For orders on CMA 4240/2023 4.For hearing of main case 06-09-2023 Mr. Ajeebullah Junejo, Advocate for petitioner. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
